subcodes.first_line: O Ali, submissive and humble one! Today the eternal glory of the human world lies in character and comportment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی خاضع خاشع الیوم عزت ابدیهٌ عالم انسانی در صفت و سمت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
